title: Quick Watches
text: Quick Watches Calculate the value of a valid ProcScript expression, add the expression to the Watches pane of the Debugger, or do both. Because the debugger does not compile the entered expression, you cannot use compile time constants, including ProcScript error constants. Refer to the following topics: Quick Watch fields and values ProcScript expressions Editing To edit Quick Watches, refer to Working with watches . Related Links Uniface Debugger (Online Help) The Uniface Debugger is a Uniface application that can connect to a local or remote Uniface application process so that you can conduct step-by-step, real time analysis of the executing ProcScript. It enables you to find and correct ProcScript errors, investigate application behavior, and improve code in all types of Uniface application. Fields, Variables, or Watches Change the value of a field, variable, or watch expression. Specify a new value for the field, variable or watch. Then click Apply or Close. Selectable Watches Select fields, variables, and ProcScript functions to add to the Watches pane. The list of Selectable Watches is determined by the Scope and Function fields.
